enable.label: Enable Auto-Sync
enable.description: Automatically sync employee data from Azure AD on a daily schedule.

time.label: Sync Time
time.description: Daily sync time in your local timezone (stored as UTC).

azure.label: Sync from Azure AD
azure.ready: Azure AD credentials are configured. Click Sync Now to fetch employees.
azure.notConfigured: Azure AD credentials are not set. Set AZURE_TENANT_ID, AZURE_CLIENT_ID, and AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET in .env to enable.
azure.error: Unable to check Azure AD status.

json.label: MicroSIP JSON Directory
json.description: Enable MicroSIP-compatible JSON directory feed for softphone integration.

xml.label: Yealink XML Phonebook
xml.description: Enable Yealink-compatible XML remote phonebook feed for desk phones.

numberSwaps.label: Number Swaps
numberSwaps.description: Find and replace text in Azure AD phone numbers. Leave "Replace" empty to remove the matched text.

custom.label: Custom Directory Contacts
custom.description: Add extra contacts that are not in Azure AD to the directory feeds.

flash.syncError: Failed to sync from Azure AD.
